case_title: LEENA SHAH VS. BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY SHAH, LEENA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2017 BY PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LEENA SHAH. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S REPRESENTATIVE JENNIFER GARRISON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
